subject: ASAP: .NET Developer – .NET – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a lead .NET Developer with strong experience in .NET. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• .NET
• Kubernetes
• Redis

Details:
Client: NordHealth
Start: ASAP
Duration: 3 months
Location: Stockholm (remote)
Rate: up to 975 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
